title: Cistanthe celosioides
taxonomy: Cistanthe celosioides is classified as a member of the family Portulacaceae. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales. Cistanthe celosioides is a genus of flowering plants native to South America. The specific classification of Cistanthe celosioides is Cistanthe celosioides, which is often referred to as the 'celosia-flowered cistanthe'. It is closely related to other plants in the same family, such as Montia and Calandrinia.
